import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useCart } from '../context/CartContext'; import { Trash2, Minus, Plus, ShoppingBag } from 'lucide-react'; const Cart = () => { const { cart, updateQuantity, removeFromCart, getCartTotal } = useCart(); if (!cart || !cart.items || cart.items.length === 0) { return (

Your cart is empty

Looks like you haven't added any items yet.

Continue Shopping
); } return (

Shopping Cart

{cart.items.map((item) => (

{item.product.name}

€{item.product.price}

{item.quantity}

Subtotal

€{(item.product.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}

))}

Order Summary

Subtotal €{getCartTotal().toFixed(2)}
Shipping Free
Total €{getCartTotal().toFixed(2)}
Continue Shopping
); }; export default Cart;
